# Ditto — Design System Extractor

> Ditto extracts design systems from any website and lets you blend multiple inspirations into a unique design system.

## What Ditto Does

Ditto reverse-engineers websites using headless browser CSS analysis (zero AI) to extract complete design token sets — colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and component patterns. Users can combine 2-10 website inspirations with adjustable mood-based weights to generate hybrid design systems that are uniquely theirs.

## Key Features

- **Design Extraction**: Paste any URL, get 100+ design tokens in under 30 seconds
- **Blending Engine**: Combine multiple site inspirations with weighted mood dimensions (warmth, energy, density, etc.)
- **Live Preview**: See your design system across 6 page templates (Landing, Dashboard, Auth, Pricing, Blog, Components)
- **Production-Ready Export**: DESIGN.md spec, CSS custom properties, React components
- **Figma Integration**: Push design tokens directly to Figma as variables

## Who It's For

- Frontend developers who need a design system without starting from scratch
- UI/UX designers looking for inspiration-based design generation
- Startups and agencies that want unique design systems fast
- Teams migrating from ad-hoc CSS to structured design tokens

## Pricing

- **Free**: 3 extractions/month, 1 project, DESIGN.md + CSS export
- **Pro ($19/mo)**: Unlimited extractions, unlimited projects, React export, Figma push
- **Team ($49/mo)**: Everything in Pro + 5 seats, shared library, team history

## Links

- Homepage: https://ditto.design

- Documentation: https://ditto.design/docs
